---
title: "Credits"
format:
  html:
    title-block: false
---

<div class="simple-page">
<a class="back-link" href="index.html">Home</a>

<h1>Credits</h1>

<p>All images used on this site are open source from <a href="https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Main_Page">Wikimedia Commons</a>. All ideas are my own.</p>
</div>
